projects.title: Power BI Dashboard Development
points: Designed and delivered multiple Power BI dashboards — Portfolio at Risk, Agent Productivity, Claims, and Insurance — for business stakeholders.
Developed DAX measures and data models to support dynamic reporting and KPI tracking.
Collaborated with business teams to gather requirements and translate them into actionable visual analytics.

projects.title: SSRS-to-Databricks Migration  (200–400 Reports)
points: Played a key role in the end-to-end migration of 200–400 SSRS reports from SQL Server to Databricks, converting embedded T-SQL to Databricks-compatible SQL.
Automated extraction of table references and T-SQL queries from .rdl files using Python scripting, significantly reducing manual effort.
Configured ODBC connectivity via Simba Spark Driver and Databricks Personal Access Tokens to repoint reports to the new platform.
Performed thorough validation of query outputs between SQL Server and Databricks, classifying discrepancies as data sync or logic issues.
Investigated and resolved query-level discrepancies, ensuring data accuracy and consistency post-migration.

projects.title: ETL Pipeline Development & DBT Deployment on Azure DevOps
points: Converted existing T-SQL stored procedures into DBT models for Databricks, restructuring transformation logic to process and structure raw data for downstream consumption.

Rebuilt the remaining stored procedures as Databricks notebooks and deployed both the DBT models and notebooks through Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines, maintaining full version control in the repository.
Authored Terraform configuration to provision and schedule the corresponding job in Databricks.
